news.t: Putnam Investments Launches Fixed Income and Non-U.S. Equity Exchange-Traded Funds
Putnam Investments to Launch Two Innovative Active ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PBDC is an equity ETF with a total of 23 individual holdings. The top holdings are Ares Capital stock at 11.91%, Blue Owl Technology Finance at 11.02%, Blue Owl Capital at 9.92%, Golub Capital BDC at 7.60%, and Hercules Capital at 7.45%.

overview.description: The Putnam BDC Income ETF (PBDC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund is actively managed to hold a portfolio of US business development companies (BDCs) whose principal business is to invest in, lend capital to, or provide services to privately held or thinly traded US companies. PBDC was launched on Sep 29, 2022 and is issued by Putnam.
